zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Gregg於1697年11月6日出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾蒙特時，她的父親Alexander Gregg17歲，母親Isabell Lead18歲。她於1715年7月14日與Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆卡蒙利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1770年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Gregg于1697年11月6日出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾蒙特时，她的父亲Alexander Gregg17岁，母亲Isabell Lead18岁。她于1715年7月14日与Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆卡蒙利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1770年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gregg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): from the Middle English personal name Greg, a pet form of Gregory ; compare Grigg .

variants.name: Cregg
meanings: English (Lancashire) and Irish: perhaps a variant of Gregg with devoicing of the initial g.

variants.name: Greggs
meanings: English: variant of Gregg , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Gregson
meanings: English (Lancashire): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Greg (see Gregg ), a short form of the personal name Gregory + son.

variants.name: Gregory
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a personal name that was popular throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages. The Greek original, Grēgorios, is a derivative of grēgorein ‘to be awake, to be watchful’. However, the Latin form, Gregorius, came to be associated by folk etymology with grex, gregis ‘flock, herd’, under the influence of the Christian image of the good shepherd. The Greek name was borne in the early Christian centuries by two fathers of the Orthodox Church, Saint Gregory Nazianzene (c. 325–390) and Saint Gregory of Nyssa (c. 331–395), and later by sixteen popes, starting with Gregory the Great (c. 540–604). It was also the name of 3rd- and 4th-century apostles of Armenia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Gregorio , German, Slovak, and Slovenian Gregor , Polish Grzegorz, Czech Řehoř (see Rehor ), and French Gregoire , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Polish Grzegorczyk .

variants.name: Gragg
meanings: English: variant of   Gregg   and possibly also of   Cragg  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Gregg was born on 6 November 1697, in Monquhitter, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Gregg, was 17 and her mother, Isabell Lead, was 18. She married Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick on 14 July 1715, in Carnmoney, County Antrim, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1770, in Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Gregg est née le 6 novembre 1697, à Monquhitter, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Gregg, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Isabell Lead, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick le 14 juillet 1715, à Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1770, à Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans.

Juli 1715 in Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irland Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1770 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

Lei sposato Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick il 14 luglio 1715, nel Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1770, nel Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Gregg(이)가 1697년 11월 6일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 몬크히터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Gregg(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabell Lead(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1715년 7월 14일 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림 카른몬이에서 Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1770년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gregg nasceu em 6 de novembro de 1697, em Monquhitter, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Gregg, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Lead, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick em 14 de julho de 1715, em Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1770, em Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Gregg родилась 6 ноября 1697 г. в местности монкухиттир, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Gregg было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Lead, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick 14 июля 1715 г. в местности карнмоуни, коунти антрим, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1770 г. в местности Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Gregg nació el 6 de noviembre de 1697, en Monquhitter, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Gregg, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Isabell Lead, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Hugh Blain Kirkpatrick el 14 de julio de 1715, en Carnmoney, County Antrim, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1770, en Pensilvania, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años.
